description: A primary care physician needs to review and act on abnormal lab results that have arrived in their EHR inbox.

nodes.task_description: Open the EHR inbox and identify the critical lab result notification.

expected_outcome.value: Physician opens their inbox and sees a high-priority result.

nodes.task_description: Review the lab result, noting that the patient's potassium level is critically high.

expected_outcome.value: Physician correctly interprets the abnormal lab value.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the result and send a message to their nurse to call the patient and instruct them to go to the emergency room.

expected_outcome.value: Physician takes appropriate clinical action by acknowledging the result and delegating follow-up.
